# DevSora

DevSora is a deep-tech robotics and AI company.

Tagline:
Engineering The Impossible.

Status:
Pre-incubated at AIC MUJ.

Vision:
To make advanced robotics accessible to every builder, creator, and innovator.

Mission:
Building the hardware, software, and ecosystems that power the next generation of intelligent machines.

Current Projects:

* RIO
* Modular Robotics Platform
* AI & Autonomy Stack

Website:
https://www.devsora.com

GitHub:
https://github.com/DevSoraGlobal

Instagram:
https://instagram.com/devsora_global

LinkedIn:
https://linkedin.com/company/devsora
